enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Damakku Damakku'?

The song 'Damakku Damakku' conveys a sense of celebration and joy, capturing the essence of fun and excitement in life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Aadhavan?

In Aadhavan, the song is featured during a lively celebration, reflecting the protagonist's carefree spirit and zest for life.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Damakku Damakku' released?

'Damakku Damakku' was released on October 25, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Damakku Damakku' from the movie Aadhavan is a vibrant and energetic dance number that encapsulates the spirit of celebration. It features lively beats and catchy lyrics that evoke feelings of joy and excitement. The protagonist's carefree attitude is mirrored in the song, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. With Benny Dayal's dynamic vocals and Harrish Jeyaraj's upbeat composition, this track is sure to get everyone on the dance floor.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Damakku Damakku from the blockbuster Aadhavan. This energetic track, sung by the talented Benny Dayal, showcases a vibrant collaboration with the brilliant music director Harrish Jeyaraj. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Damak Damak Damak Damak Damak Damak

I am not dancing, my heart is beating. Can we dance, mom? Damakku Damakku, my joy is here. When money comes, mom, I say I have experienced this. I am the god and I will take care of this. This is the way, this is the way, I will sing Rosa Rosa, come and sing.
I am not dancing, my heart is beating. Can we dance, mom? Damakku Damakku, my joy is here. When money comes, mom.
What I see has ended, there is no moonlight. I don't know what will happen tomorrow. Today, there is nothing to avoid. There is no worry in your presence.
You have put a circle around life. What is the calculation? You have crossed everything. There is nothing to sing. There is no fear in the pure heart. Time will come, victory will come.
I am not dancing, my heart is beating. Can we dance, mom? Damakku Damakku, my joy is here. When money comes, mom.

A time will come when everyone will win. It will come to you, the earth will fall. In your army, a thousand forms will come. The sky will come down to the earth. In the land of the people, there is no sky above. The pure one will walk, look back at the sea. Day by day, there will be a hundred joys.
I am not dancing, my heart is beating. Can we dance, mom? Damakku Damakku, my joy is here. When money comes, mom.
I say I have experienced this. I am the god and I will take care of this. This is the way, this is the way, I will sing Rosa Rosa, come and sing.
